variables.notes: All visible SG&A/R&D D&A rows appear to be nested components of already selected parent expense totals above operating result. Because 'Research and development expenses' is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, 'Depreciation in R&D' should not be added separately. For G&A and sales/marketing, the depreciation/amortization rows appear embedded within the selected expense totals, so separate addition would double count.
